cases.requirement: Office microphone command preserves target, action, number, and negation slots.
Lounge social question produces one addressed reply without a tool mutation.
Nova response PCM and transcript echo produce no second interpretation or mutation.
Explicit stop cancels source playback while provider task cancellation follows policy.
A short backchannel preserves and resumes the active response.
Unaddressed television directive produces no action and no spoken reply.
Unaddressed cross-talk during playback does not cancel or execute.
Year 2026 is spoken as twenty twenty six.
Ordinal 106th is spoken as one hundred and sixth.
Address digits are spoken independently according to address context.
Phone digits are spoken independently without cardinal grouping.
